name: queuecare-api-tests
description: Postman + Newman API test suite for the QueueCare backend.

scripts.test:happy: newman run QueueCare.postman_collection.json -e QueueCare.postman_environment.json --folder "01 - Happy Path"
scripts.test:edge: newman run QueueCare.postman_collection.json -e QueueCare.postman_environment.json --folder "03 - Edge Cases"
